title: T-019 — API: Allergen contamination risk matrix CRUD
prompt: Implement /api/technical/allergens/contamination-risk endpoints per §10.5 and TEC-043. GET by line_id and/or machine_id. POST/PUT upsert (line_id|machine_id, allergen_code, risk_level, mitigation, last_assessed_at, assessed_by). Validate risk_level enum. V-TEC-43 warning surfacing: GET also returns coverage gaps (active line/machine × EU-14 allergens missing entries). Permission technical.allergens.edit. RED tests/api/contamination-risk.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/contamination-risk.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cross-contamination risk grid CRUD with coverage-gap report.
pipeline_inputs.details: Coverage gap = LEFT JOIN production_lines × allergens_reference (EU-14) without entries. Useful for V-TEC-43 dashboard. Permission gate uses technical.allergens.edit on writes.
acceptance_criteria: Given line L1 has entry only for A01, when GET /contamination-risk?line_id=L1, then response includes 'gaps' array of remaining EU-14 codes.
Given POST risk_level='extreme', when validated, then 422 (not in enum).
Given valid upsert, when re-POST same key, then update wins (no duplicate).
test_strategy: RED tests for gap computation + enum + upsert.
risk_red_lines: Do not couple to 08-PRODUCTION allergen gate code here.
